sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ بِنْتٌ اسْمُهَا مَيَسُ تُحِبُّ النُّجُومَ.
sentences.translation: Bila je djevojčica po imenu Majas koja je voljela zvijezde.
sentences.translationEn: There was a girl named Mayes who loved the stars.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ تَرْسُمُهَا كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ فِي دَفْتَرِهَا.
sentences.translation: Svake večeri ih je crtala u svojoj bilježnici.
sentences.translationEn: She drew them every night in her notebook.

sentences.arabic: رَأَتِ الْمُعَلِّمَةُ الدَّفْتَرَ وَاقْتَرَحَتْ أَنْ تَدْرُسَ الْفَلَكَ.
sentences.translation: Učiteljica je vidjela bilježnicu i predložila da studira astronomiju.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher saw the notebook and suggested she study astronomy.

sentences.arabic: قَرَأَتْ مَيَسُ كِتَابًا عَنِ النُّجُومِ وَعَرَفَتْ أَسْمَاءَ كَثِيرَةٍ مِنْهَا.
sentences.translation: Majas je pročitala knjigu o zvijezdama i naučila mnoga njihova imena.
sentences.translationEn: Mayes read a book about stars and learned many of their names.
